subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath revealed the Book, made manifest the clear tokens, and spoken with the tongue of grandeur ere the creation of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الکتاب و اظهر البینات و نطق بلسان العظمه قبل خلق الارضین
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @praise and encouragement
